2021.note: Spike: 247 vs max 113. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Conference expanded to multiple submission cycles ~2020. Sustained growth to 487 (2025).

2022.note: Spike: 256 vs max 113. Investigated 2026-03-12: real growth. Same multi-cycle expansion as 2021. Sustained through 2025.
